source.section: 2.1.1 - Radar Display > 2.1.1.2 - AZ/EL Format > D - FLIR Sensor Mode Sub-level

steps.action: Ensure FLIR is powered and A/A Master Mode is selected
Set AZ/EL page on any DDI (we will take the left one), then press Sensor Control Switch LEFT to select the left DDI. Selection Diamond should be visible.
Press and hold TDC (Throttle Designation Controller), then slew TDC over a HAFU symbol in the AZ/EL page.
When TDC is released, HAFU symbol will become the L&S (Launch & Steering) Primary Target designated by the target.
Press the OSB next to “IFF RDR” to select FLIR sub-page.
In this particular situation, the FLIR line-of-sight is currently not slaved to the target we have radar locked.
Press on the OSB next to RRSLV to slave the targeting pod to the radar locked target. The line-of-sight symbol should slew over the L&S.
Press FLIR DSPLY to access the FLIR feed, which will show the target through the targeting pod’s sensor.
